title: WalletProfileRequest
description: Body of `POST /primitive/wallet_profile`. Wraps the existing `WalletProfileInput` with the snapshot lease so the route is addressable from Python without ambient state.

TimeScope.description: Mandatory temporal frame for primitives that have one (per D-6). Externally tagged so `Live` serializes as the bare string `"live"` (which is what models naturally produce for unit variants) and `Range` as `{"range": {"from_s": ..., "to_s": ...}}`. The internally-tagged form was tried first and the model misinterpreted the schema, sending strings where objects were expected.

oneOf.description: Absolute block-time range. Routes to warehouse path (ship-5).

time_scope.description: Required temporal frame. v0 supports Live; Range routes to a stubbed warehouse path.
